rationale: The advisory marks bigint-buffer versions through 1.1.5 as vulnerable and lists >=1.1.6 as patched, but npm currently publishes no 1.1.6 or later release. The current Wormhole/Solana dependency path requires bigint-buffer ^1.1.5; forcing the nonexistent patched version would break reproducible installation.
remediation: Adopt the first upstream bigint-buffer release containing the fix, or replace the Wormhole/Solana dependency path with a validated alternative before the exception expires.
